final:
module priority_arbiter (
    input  [3:0] deny,
    output reg [3:0] grant
);
    always @(*) begin
        grant = 4'b0000; // Default no grant
        if (deny[3]) grant[3] = 1'b1; // Grant to deny[3]
        else if (deny[2]) grant[2] = 1'b1; // Grant to deny[2]
        else if (deny[1]) grant[1] = 1'b1; // Grant to deny[1]
        else if (deny[0]) grant[0] = 1'b1; // Grant to deny[0]
    end
endmodule
